records.ety: [L. circumventis, p. p. of circumvenire, to come around, encompass, deceive; circum + venire to come, akin to E. come.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Circumvented; p. pr. & vb. n. Circumventing.]

defs: To gain advantage over by arts, stratagem, or deception; to deceive; to delude; to get around.
quotes: I circumvented whom I could not gain.
